name: Lumpia
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, brown the meat with garlic and onion.
2. Add water chestnuts, bean sprouts, salt, pepper, and patis or soy sauce; cook for 2 minutes.
3. Drain and cool thoroughly.
4. Combine flour and water to make a paste.
5. To assemble lumpia: Place 2 tablespoons of filling on a wrapper.
6. Fold the nearest edge of the wrapper over the filling.
7. Fold the left and right sides toward the center.
8. Roll tightly toward the open edge, sealing with the paste.
9. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C).
10. Fry lumpia until golden brown; drain on paper towels.
11. Serve with Lumpia Dipping Sauce.
12. Makes 30 lumpia.
